text:
Emirates Stadium, association football stadium located in Islington, North London, also known as Arsenal Stadium, The Emirates, The Emirates Stadium. Attributes include: 
- main building contractor: "Sir Robert McAlpine"
- located in the administrative territorial entity: "London Borough of Islington"
- Commons category: "Emirates Stadium"
- country: "United Kingdom"

- location: "Holloway"
